official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound update_tags empty map body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns update_tags to packet id 0x86.
The empty-map fixture body is a zero registry payload map count.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, registry payload count fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer registry keys, tag payload entries, or registry reload behavior.
